items.text: Aviate_Decider maintains internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts total number of currently active service requests
items.fragment: Aviate_Decider maintains internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts total number of currently active service requests
items.requirement_fragment: Aviate_Decider maintains internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts total number of currently active service requests

items.text: Aviate_Decider implements dynamicDecide logic where if inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) ensures no secondary collision, then decision is ACAS, else decision is GCAS
items.fragment: Aviate_Decider implements dynamicDecide logic where if inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) ensures no secondary collision, then decision is ACAS, else decision is GCAS

items.text: Aviate_Decider output outDec uses dynamic decision result when numberServicesTrue >= 2, otherwise falls back to static priority-based decision
